channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: USF men's basketball coach Amir Abdur-Rahim dies at 43
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — South Florida coach Amir Abdur-Rahim, who led the Bulls to the American Athletic Conference's regular-season championship a year ago, has died, the school announced Thursday. He was 43.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Browns sue city of Cleveland over 'Modell Law' designed to prevent their move to suburbs
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Browns' back-and-forth battle with Cleveland over a planned move into a new suburban stadium has gone to court.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sergio Perez admits he's having a 'terrible season,' hopes to turn F1 fortunes around at home race
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — By his own assessment, this Formula 1 season has been a massive disappointment for Sergio Perez. But if there's one place for him to turn it around, it would be at his home race, the Mexico City Grand Prix, which he considers the best event on the F1 circuit.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cardinals call audible on game plan for cheerleaders due to new seating
item.description: The Arizona Cardinals changed their game plan for their cheerleading squad, and alumni took notice, appearing to be upset with the move.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York Liberty basketball team honored with ticker-tape parade in Canyon of Heroes
item.description: Jonquel Jones, Breanna Stewart, Sabrina Ionescu and their New York teammates were showered with confetti as the Liberty celebrated winning the WNBA title in the Canyon of Heroes in downtown Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jimmy Coenraets named permanent Utah Royals head coach
item.description: In a move many people may have expected, the Utah Royals have named interim head coach Jimmy Coenraets as permanent head coach.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: On CFP media: ESPN’s replacement for #Pac12AfterDark attracting similar, but not equal, viewership numbers
item.description: The #AfterDark window isn't performing as well following the dissolution of the Pac-12, but the drop is limited thus far.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA opens investigation into Joel Embiid's playing status after 76ers star misses season opener
item.description: The NBA is investigating why Philadelphia center Joel Embiid did not play in the team's nationally televised season opener against Milwaukee. The league confirmed the investigation on Thursday. It was opened as part of the NBA's player participation policy that went into effect last season.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA outlook is promising after record-setting year, although the league has a few challenges ahead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA looks promising heading into the offseason after a banner year with record ratings, attendance and a first-time champion in New York.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UFC stars tout Trump in appeal to Arab American voters in Michigan
item.description: UFC stars Justin Gaethje, Beneil Dariush and Henry Cejudo stumped for former President Donald Trump in an appeal to Arab American voters in Michigan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Parent of WWE and UFC is buying Professional Bull Riders, On Location and IMG for $3.25 billion
item.description: TKO Group, the sports entertainment company that houses WWE and UFC, is buying Professional Bull Riders, On Location, and IMG from Endeavor Group in an all-stock deal valued at $3.25 billion.
item.dc:creator: Michelle Chapman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Markkanen scores 35, but Jazz comeback falls short
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a slow start to the season for the Utah Jazz, but they finished strong. It just wasn't enough against the Memphis Grizzlies.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Healthy LaMelo Ball shines in 1st game since January, scoring 34 points in Hornets' win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — LaMelo Ball looked like the superstar that nagging ankle injuries have kept him from being for most of the last two seasons in Charlotte’s opener on Wednesday night. Playing in a regular-season game for the first time since Jan.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NC State's Grayson McCall gives up football, says he can't come back from latest head injury
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina State quarterback Grayson McCall announced his retirement from football on Wednesday night, less than three weeks after a vicious hit knocked him out of a game for the second time this season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hybricon Games enters third season
item.description: “Every year before the Hybricon Games, I’m like, ‘I’m never doing that again.’ But immediately after, I want more,” says Austen Alexander.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Washington Commanders rookie QB Jayden Daniels misses practice because of his rib injury
item.description: ASHBURN, Va. (AP) — Jayden Daniels missed Washington Commanders practice Wednesday because of a rib injury, casting further doubt on his availability to play this weekend against Caleb Williams and the Chicago Bears in what's supposed to be a matchup of the top two quarterbacks in the 2024 draft.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: World Series ticket prices double those of last year
item.description: With New York and Los Angeles facing off in this year's World Series, it's not surprising that ticket prices could give some sticker shock. But even with that knowledge in mind, the Dodgers-Yankees matchup is bringing in some historic prices.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: How Fernando Valenzuela changed Los Angeles forever
item.description: The historic impact Fernando Valenzuela made on the city of Los Angeles traces its roots to the 1950s, according to renounced sports commentator Roy Firestone. After calling Brooklyn home for more than a half-century, Dodgers owner Walter O’Malley got approval in 1957 to move the team to L.A.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: How the Delta Center converts from hockey to basketball in less than 24 hours
item.description: How does the crew thaw out the arena in time for basketball to take over hockey? The secret is they don't.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Ottawa shuts out Utah Hockey Club, 4-0
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an eight-minute blitz from which the Utah Hockey Club could not receover. Anton Forsberg made 31 saves, Drake Batherson scored his third goal in two games and the Ottawa Senators won their first road game of the season, 4-0 victory over Utah HC Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Flaherty to start World Series Game 1 for Dodgers - Rapid Reaction
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Game 1 of the World Series will have a SoCal feel. Not just because it will be played at Dodger Stadium, but both starting pitchers have area ties.
item.dc:creator: Rahshaun Haylock, KTLA 5

item.title: POLL: MLB wants the Tampa Bay Rays to play in the area if hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field is unfit
item.description: Major League Baseball hopes to find the Tampa Bay Rays a temporary home near their fanbase for the start of the 2025 season if their home field can't be repaired in time. Tropicana Field's fabric dome in St. Petersburg was shredded by Hurricane Milton’s winds.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 49ers WR Brandon Aiyuk to miss season with knee injury
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers wide receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the remainder of the 2024 season after suffering a knee injury in the 49ers' loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday. Head coach Kyle Shanahan reported that he tore the MCL and ACL in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Trump criticizes 'ugly' new NFL kickoff rule
item.description: "I hated seeing what the NFL did with the kickoff return,” Trump posted Sunday night on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, NewsNation

item.title: Photo Gallery: NL Champs! Dodgers finish Mets to advance to World Series
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are heading to the 2024 World Series. With a 10-5 home win over the Mets on Sunday, the Dodgers claimed their 25th National League pennant, beating New York 4 games to 2 in the best of seven series.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, KTLA 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Juan Soto's 3-run homer in 10th sends Yankees past Guardians 5-2 and into World Series for 41st time
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Juan Soto was supposed to be the difference-maker, the one who pushed the New York Yankees back to the top. They're one step away.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: SDSU'S Sack Master Trey White
item.description: Sacks are such an unpredictable stat in the game of Football. You can be absolutely unlockable as a defender, but if the quarterback gets the ball out of his hands before you arrive, it's all for not in the stat column.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Former NFL quarterback Jay Cutler arrested on DUI, gun charges
item.description: The former Bears and Broncos quarterback Jwas arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, Fox 5
